name: darwinian
description: Agent-driven layer over the Darwinian Harness drwn CLI for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Agent skills wrapping the drwn CLI.
interface.longDescription: Bootstrap projects, install locked cards, materialize downstream state, apply, author, and share reusable Harness Cards, manage local library/defaults, and inspect, support, or repair harness state with approval checkpoints at consequential writes.
defaultPrompt: Bootstrap my harness in this repo
Install the locked cards for this cloned project
Inspect why this skill is active
